description: Composition Black cardigan made of 77% cotton, 20% nylon and 3% spandex, has long sleeves, V-neck, buttoned at front, ribbed neckline, placket, cuffs and hemline, velvet strip at inner back neck and small metal logo on lower front Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleach Dry flat in shade Cool iron This soft black cardigan from arrow woman is easy to take on and off depending on the changing temperature - ideal for those days when you're not sure about the weather. Smart enough to wear over a shirt at the office. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
